title: Tunisian Date Tagine
description: A French-inspired dessert using traditional Tunisian ingredients, featuring a sweet and sticky date filling.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, melted chocolate, and tagine spice blend. Heat over low heat, stirring until smooth.
Add pitted dates to the saucepan and stir to coat with the chocolate mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a 20cm (8-inch) round baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly gooey.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
